case_title: HELEN JIE YING TAN VS. JOHN CHI SHENG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT HELEN JIE YING. DEFENDANT JOHN CHI SHENG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER RUSSELL SHENG. THE MANDARIN INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, HELEN JIE YING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHENG, JOHN CHI THE LOAN CONTRACT WAS MADE IN 1998. A LAWSUIT TO ENFORCE A WRITTEN PROMISE MUST BE BROUGHT NO LATER THAN FOUR YEARS AFTER A BREACH OF THAT PROMISE. SEE CAL. CODE CIVIL PROCEDURE 337.1 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED NOV-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHENG, JOHN CHI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TAN, HELEN JIE YING AS TO DEFENDANT SHENG, JOHN CHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
